SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao

Interface DigSiteSquareDao

public interface DigSiteSquareDao
Data Access Object interface for DigSiteSquare entity. Provides methods for managing individual squares on the game board, including batch operations for game initialization and state updates.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default List<Long>
    insert(Collection<DigSiteSquare> digSiteSquares)
     
    List<Long>
    insertRaw(Collection<DigSiteSquare> digSiteSquares)
    Inserts a batch of dig site squares into the database, typically when populating a new game board.
    DigSiteSquare
    selectByCoordinates(long gridId, int x, int y)
    Retrieves a single dig site square by its coordinates within a specific grid.
    LiveData<List<DigSiteSquare>>
    selectByGridId(long gridId)
    Retrieves all dig site squares for a specific grid as observable live data.
    DigSiteSquare
    selectById(long id)
    Retrieves a single dig site square by its primary key.
    default int
    update(DigSiteSquare digSiteSquare)

    update(Collection<DigSiteSquare> digSiteSquares)

    updateRaw(DigSiteSquare digSiteSquare)
    Updates a single dig site square, typically used when a player interacts with a square on the board.
    int
    updateRaw(Collection<DigSiteSquare> digSiteSquares)
    Updates multiple dig site squares in a batch operation.

  • Method Details

    • insertRaw

      List<Long> insertRaw(Collection<DigSiteSquare> digSiteSquares)
      Inserts a batch of dig site squares into the database, typically when populating a new game board.
      Parameters:
      digSiteSquares - Collection of squares to insert.
      Returns:
      List of generated primary key IDs.

    • insert

      default List<Long> insert(Collection<DigSiteSquare> digSiteSquares)

    • selectByGridId

      LiveData<List<DigSiteSquare>> selectByGridId(long gridId)
      Retrieves all dig site squares for a specific grid as observable live data.
      Parameters:
      gridId - Grid ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing list of all squares in the specified grid.

    • selectById

      DigSiteSquare selectById(long id)
      Retrieves a single dig site square by its primary key.
      Parameters:
      id - Square ID.
      Returns:
      Dig site square with the specified ID, or null if not found.

    • selectByCoordinates

      DigSiteSquare selectByCoordinates(long gridId, int x, int y)
      Retrieves a single dig site square by its coordinates within a specific grid.
      Parameters:
      gridId - Grid ID.
      x - X coordinate.
      y - Y coordinate.
      Returns:
      Dig site square at the specified coordinates, or null if not found.

    • updateRaw

      int updateRaw(DigSiteSquare digSiteSquare)
      Updates a single dig site square, typically used when a player interacts with a square on the board.
      Parameters:
      digSiteSquare - Dig site square to update.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated (should be 1).

    • update

      default int update(DigSiteSquare digSiteSquare)

    • updateRaw

      int updateRaw(Collection<DigSiteSquare> digSiteSquares)
      Updates multiple dig site squares in a batch operation. Useful for cascading reveals.
      Parameters:
      digSiteSquares - Collection of squares to update.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.

    • update

      default int update(Collection<DigSiteSquare> digSiteSquares)
